variants.title: HiFi Filter SAL 180280180CV Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAL 180280180CV Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAL 180280180CV is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: COMPLETE AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 276.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 180.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M8X1,25, Height 1 (H1): 231.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 216.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 189.0 mm
